contract.payment_cadence: Ordering Period (annual), Task Order / Milestone based for NRE
documents: drive://(1305M226D0012) Attachment 2-Schedule of Items and Prices_1305M226D0012.pdf

line_items.description: Operations and Training Support Services across 5 periods: Mission Days Operational Support (30 days × $2,850 × 5 periods = $427,500); Operator & Observer Training (5 × $6,000 = $30,000); Instructor Training (5 × $600 = $3,000); less $31,500 double-count = $429,000 net
Course Development: Operator and Observer Course Development + Instructor Training Course Development (2 courses × $6,000 × 5 periods = $60,000)
Travel for Operational Support (5 periods × $50,000 NTE per period)
Non-Recurring Engineering: Technical Documentation ($66,000 × 5 = $330,000); NRE Modeling ($66,000 × 5 = $330,000); NHC Workflow Integration ($66,000 × 5 = $330,000)
Operational and Testing Support (6 days × $6,000 × 5 periods = $180,000); net after correction $72,000
